trans-unit.source:
Choose an title for this social media link.

Used as text for link and the title attribute.

Set a unique identifier for the social media link, e.g. twitter, facebooklink, facebookshare.

Note that only lower case characters are allowed.
The identifier can be used for the TypoScript configuration setup. See documentation for further information about TypoScript configuration.

Select the type of the social media link.

Link = A link with the given URL will be shown.
Script = The data from the "Script Snippet" field will be displayed directly.

Set the URL for the link.

There are several placeholders like ###TOKEN### (casesensitive), which will be replaced while rendering. Default placeholders are ###URL### (URL of the current page) and ###TITLE### (Title of the current page). Futher placeholders can be set up in the TypoScript. See documentation for further information about TypoScript configuration.

Set the snippet code (mostly javascript).

There are several placeholders like ###TOKEN### (casesensitive), which will be replaced while rendering. Default placeholders are ###URL### (URL of the current page) and ###TITLE### (Title of the current page). Futher placeholders can be set up in the TypoScript. See documentation for further information about TypoScript configuration.
(optional) Set the image for the social media link. If empty the title will be used as text for the link.
